title: Decadent Polish Crepes Pancakes
description: A romantic, Polish-inspired dish featuring fresh, gooey, white chocolate chips in a delicate crepe pancake, made with love and infused with the essence of herbs.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together almond flour, granulated sugar, and salt.
In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, melted butter, and vanilla extract.
Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix until smooth.
Heat a small non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add a small amount of coconut oil to the pan and pour in a small amount of the batter.
Tilt the pan to evenly coat the bottom with the batter.
Cook for 2 minutes, until the edges start to curl and the surface is dry.
Loosen the crepe with a spatula and flip it over.
Cook for another minute, until the other side is lightly browned.
Repeat with the remaining batter, until all the crepes are cooked.
Melt the white chocolate chips in a double boiler.
Add the infused oil and fresh parsley to the melted chocolate and stir to combine.
Place a cooked crepe on a plate and spoon some of the white chocolate mixture onto the center of the crepe.
Fold the crepe in half to enclose the filling and serve immediately.
